creator: cjc@freebsd.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I believe "ethfw" is being independently maintained by the author(s) 
on his(their) own. If there is demand for ethfw in the future, that 
code is available and this PR will still be in the database for 
historical record, but I really don't see a reason to leave this PR 
open. There is no immediate interest in incorporating ethfw into the 
base system. Anyway, the PR system is not really the appropriate forum 
for such a discussion. (Maybe -hackers, -net, or -arch (BUT NOT A 
CROSSPOST TO ALL THREE!).)
